name: FCC Universal
description: Legacy FCC core after moving country handling to one verified 07:30 write followed by one 07:19 readback. The remaining 17 frames run in two rounds; only part of their semantics is independently verified.

frames.note: Opaque 10:58 request routed to bvision:0/perception_service; identical payload also closes the sequence, exact semantics are unverified
Opaque 06:72 request routed to rc:0 over /dev/ttyHS2; exact RC MCU handler and value semantics are unverified
Confirmed hash write: max_height=500; this is a flight-limit side effect, not an FCC primitive
General device ping to all:0/broadcast; handlers echo the three-byte token, so this is not an FCC or activation write
On WM260 dst 0x6f is dji_sec/sec_service; subcommand 0x31 queries a 59-byte activation-state response and is not an FCC write
03:AF GetAreaCode-family request routed to flight:0 over ICC; the receiving flight-controller MCU firmware is absent, so payload semantics remain unverified
Confirmed 09:27 SDR assistant register write: address 0xffff0048, value 2 (setForceFcc)
09:27 SDR assistant register write: address 0xffff0063, value 3; exact effect is unverified
Confirmed PM hash write: c1_regulatory_restriction=1 on bvision:4/perception_agent
Confirmed PM hash write: c1_regulatory_restriction=0 immediately after value 1
On WM260 the DJI Care dispatcher does not support subtype 0x32 and returns protocol error 0xe3 without action
Confirmed PM hash write: sdr_lost_prevent_never_takeoff_en=1 on flight:0
Confirmed PM hash write: sdr_lost_prevent_has_takeoff_en=1 on flight:0
Opaque 06:8C request routed to vt_air:0 (aircraft transmission MCU), with value 03; exact parameter is unverified
Opaque 06:8C request routed to vt_air:0 (aircraft transmission MCU), with value 01; exact parameter is unverified
Opaque 06:72 request routed to rc:0 over /dev/ttyHS2; the old commit interpretation is unverified
Same opaque 10:58 request as the first frame; old opposite enter/exit labels are unsupported
